---
title: "Geocomputation with R"
description: "Robin Lovelace, Jakub Nowosad, and Jannes Muenchow (2019). Geocomputation with R. *CRC Press*."
date: "2019-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_geocomputation_2019"
citation-type: "book"
citation-type-label: "Book"
venue: "CRC Press"
doi: ""
publication-url: "https://r.geocompx.org"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Jakub Nowosad"
  - "Jannes Muenchow"
abstract: "Book on geographic data with R."
---

**Type:** Book
**Venue:** CRC Press
**Year:** 2019

[URL](https://r.geocompx.org) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

Book on geographic data with R.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace, Jakub Nowosad, and Jannes Muenchow (2019). Geocomputation with R. *CRC Press*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@book{lovelace_geocomputation_2019,
	title = {Geocomputation with {R}},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	isbn = {1-138-30451-4},
	url = {https://r.geocompx.org},
	abstract = {Book on geographic data with R.},
	urldate = {2017-10-05},
	publisher = {CRC Press},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin and Nowosad, Jakub and Muenchow, Jannes},
	year = {2019},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
